chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 756 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For orders on CMA No.3095/2023 (Ex./A) 3. For hearing of main case 09.05.2023 Mr. Muhammad Qayyum Arain, Advocate for the petitioner..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- It is case of the petitioner that he is customer of Sukkur Electric Power Company (SEPCO) under Reference No. 29381530646000-R and he inadvertently deposited his electricity bill for the month of November 2022 in U.B.L., Qazafi Bazar Branch, Sadiqabad and the said bank transferred the amount into the account of Multan Electric Power Company (MEPCO), which fact came into his knowledge when he received monthly bill of next month which included the amount so paid by him in U.B.L., Qazafi Bazar Branch, Sadiqabad. He, therefore, seeks directions to respondents No.3 & 4 for adjustment of amount of Rs.1,51,827/- (Rupees one lac fifty one thousand eight hundred twenty seven) being bill of November 2022 and he also seeks directions to respondent No.5 to transfer the amount in the account of respondent No.3 for such adjustment. The subject matter does not fall within the territorial jurisdictions of this Court; hence, this petition is dismissed in limine along with listed application. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
